text.title: architecture-decision-records Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for architecture-decision-records as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Deleting or silently editing an accepted ADR
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Destroys the audit trail; future engineers see the current decision but not the reasoning or the failed alternatives that were considered; creates confusion when the same decision is revisited

failure-mode.description: Write-once-rot-forever: ADRs accepted and never revisited become stale; status fields (Deprecated, Superseded) demand discipline that solo teams skip.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Schedule a quarterly ADL review; use a superseder agent that cross-references ADRs vs current package.json / go.mod / Dockerfile / Terraform and flags drift.

failure-mode.description: Bikeshedding magnet: PR review on an ADR can stall for weeks while the decision needs to ship — process eats the value.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use time-boxed review periods (1 week standard, 24h urgent) and documented governance so approvals have a clear path.

failure-mode.description: Format drift: team starts on Nygard, switches to MADR mid-stream, ends with five formats coexisting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Lock format in ADR-0001; enforce via adr-lint.sh in CI; never change formats without a new ADR documenting the change.

failure-mode.description: Missing alternatives: authors list "Option A, do nothing" and "Option B, the thing we already decided." Genuine option exploration is rare without a critic agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use the four-pass pipeline with a dedicated alternatives-generation pass; require at least 2 real rejected options documented.

failure-mode.description: Decision laundering: ADR is written after the code shipped to retroactively justify it; loses its forecasting value.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Treat ADRs as PRs: branch, draft, request review, merge — the ADR PR must precede or accompany the implementation PR.

failure-mode.description: No backlinks: ADRs reference code, but code rarely references ADRs — readers find one side or the other, not both.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run a link-back agent that edits touched files to add "# See ADR-0042" comments; include Affects: paths in ADR headers.
